case_title: ALSCO VS. GATOR'S NEO SOUL - GLENN THOMPSON et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-15-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GATOR'S NEO SOUL
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-26-2009 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, ROOM 103)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ALSCO AS TO DEFENDANT GATOR'S NEO SOUL LIBORIO, KELVIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-26-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT GLEN THOMPSON, BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF AUG-26-2009 AT 8:30AM.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-26-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-26-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALSCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GATOR'S NEO SOUL LIBORIO, KELVIN $1,959.85 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,074.85, ** DEFENDANT GLENN THOMPSON DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. REQUEST FOR TREBLE DAMAGES DENIED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED UNDELIVERED. SENT TO KELVIN LIBORIO.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED. SENT TO GATOR'S NEO SOUL.
